rationale: We must exploit our temporary advantage with precision strikes to degrade Tethysian command nodes before their defenses solidify.
A forward naval presence will project power and reinforce our blockade strategy, tightening the noose on Tethysian supply routes.
Small, rapid incursions will keep the enemy off balance and prevent them from regrouping along the stabilized frontline.
Given the moderate crisis level and tightening sanctions, we must harden our critical infrastructure against retaliatory cyber operations from Tethys or its allies.
Our intelligence confirms heightened foreign espionage activity; we must identify and neutralize Tethysian agents probing our military and financial networks.
To counter growing international pressure, we will amplify our narrative of legitimate self-defense and expose Tethys’s alleged chemical weapons preparations as fact.

Precision sanctions on Tethysian defense contractors and their overseas financial facilitators will maximize economic pressure without triggering broader market instability that could backfire on global allies.
Seizing Tethys-linked offshore assets in allied jurisdictions weakens their war financing and signals resolve, complementing military strikes by degrading backend support systems.
Controlled devaluation of our currency will insulate export sectors from sanction-driven demand drops, preserving critical revenue streams amid tightening financial restrictions.
A visible and aggressive demonstration of military readiness will signal resolve and exploit Novaris’s logistical strain, deterring further advances.
Increasing domestic border and coastal patrols strengthens defensive awareness while reinforcing national unity and vigilance.
Conducting large-scale drills under realistic conditions prepares our forces for rapid escalation and projects strength to both adversaries and allies.
Strengthening our cyber defenses is critical to counter Novaris’s ongoing information warfare and prevent disruption of critical infrastructure amid heightened tensions.
Proactive counterintelligence operations will exploit enemy logistical strain by identifying and neutralizing their espionage networks seeking to exploit our vulnerabilities.
A coordinated information campaign will counter false narratives about Tethys preparing chemical weapons, preserving international support and maintaining morale domestically.
Targeting key oligarchs and financial enablers in Novaris will amplify the impact of existing sanctions while maintaining international legal and diplomatic support.
Seizing overseas assets of sanctioned Novaris entities weakens their war economy and signals resolve, complementing military and cyber deterrence efforts.
Engaging neutral economies in trade talks diversifies our supply chains and reduces vulnerability to secondary sanctions pressure.

Leveraging our 61% international support, we launch a high-profile diplomatic campaign to expose Novaris's disinformation and reaffirm Tethys’s commitment to international law, reinforcing the moral high ground.
Engaging neutral powers through formal diplomatic channels strengthens institutional backing for Tethys and pressures Novaris by widening the coalition upholding the rules-based order.
Showcasing Tethys’s resilience and democratic values through global cultural outreach counters enemy narratives and bolsters domestic unity amid ongoing information warfare.
